rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc. And Deutsche Bank National Trust Company, As Trustee For Wamu Mortgage Pass Through Certificates, Wamu 2005-Ar6s Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Plaintiff Keyhan Mohanna, Trustee Of The Keyhan Mohanna Revocable Trust Dated July 8, 2003s First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 8, 2015, line DEFENDANTS SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc. And Deutsche Bank National Trust Company, As Trustee For Wamu Mortgage Pass Through Certificates, Wamu 2005-Ar6s' Demurrer To Plaintiff Keyhan Mohanna, Trustee Of The Keyhan Mohanna Revocable Trust Dated July 8, 2003s First Amended Complaint SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Defendants and their counsel ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: ANSELMO SAUCEDO ET AL VS. BISMARK NUNEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 8, 2015, line DEFENDANT BISMARK NUNEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to reconcile allegations in the complaint, Notice and argument in the opposition regarding the contract governing the tenancy written/oral/modified etc. See Complaint paragraphs 6(a); 6(a)(2); 6(b); 6(d); Lease paragraph 1 and 2; and Notice to Perform Conditions and/or Quit. Also, to reconcile the title of the Notice attached to the Complaint and the Notice alleged to have been served per paragraph 7(1) of Complaint. = (501/GLW)
